query:
SELECT 
  orderNo,
  customerName,
  deliveryTeacher,
  courseAmount,
  teacherFee,
  transportFee,
  partnerFee,
  createdAt
FROM orders 
WHERE channelOrderNo IN ('4200002901202601055351076736', '4200002915202512312083351883')
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
